uncertainties:
Assumptions:
- Child issue numbers are placeholders due to dry run.
- Acceptance criteria and file paths are inferred based on typical repo structure and feature scope.
- All slices are AFK; no HITL tasks identified from prompt or constraints.
- No code or GitHub mutations performed.

Uncertainties:
- Exact file paths and test commands may differ in the real repo.
- Some implementation details may require further clarification in a real run.
